description: 200ms debounced vault.export() triggers full denormalization per edit. Every vault mutation: 200ms debounce then vault.export() (full recursive tree walk, clone every entity, reconstruct nested tree) then root prop update cascading re-renders across all mounted views. Auto-save compounds with second full denormalization + JSON + Blob + IDB write.
resolution: Replace full denormalization with incremental/partial export. Use granular subscriptions per view instead of single root prop. Separate auto-save from render path.

name: root prop cascades re-renders across all views
description: App.svelte maintains root variable (denormalized vault state) passed as prop to ArchiveView, BoardView, MetadataView, MapView, TimelineView, and all dialogs. Any vault mutation triggers root change then Svelte reactive update across entire component tree. All views re-render even when mutation affects one entity in one view.

name: 9 effect blocks in App.svelte with overlapping reactive deps
description: App.svelte has 9 effect blocks in same scope. vault.state tracked by both export-debounce and validation effects (overlapping deps). Validation effect cleanup calls validation.destroy() clearing timer — re-run on vault.state change destroys store before new schedule. Fragile to future refactors adding state to destroy().

Annotation context save/clear functions become stale closures on view switch. AnnotationContext registers save/clear fns imperatively from Annotorious viewer overlay. Viewer unmount leaves stale closures over destroyed DOM. Context does not null them. Save annotation from Inspector calls stale fn — throws or silently fails.
resolution: Null out registered functions on viewer unmount. Add guard checking if registering component is mounted. Use ViewBus lifecycle to coordinate.

description: Board feature: 13 @migration stubs, save does nothing. handleBoardSave() logs console.warn and returns — no vault action, no persistence. Export (PNG/SVG/Content State) stubbed. Z-index commented out. Thumbnail returns placeholder. Connection line imports commented out. Arranging items on canvas lost on view close.
resolution: Phase 0 prerequisite: Board persistence (two-tier IIIF + Workspace). Must implement before board is usable.

description: Validation pipeline is inert. scheduleValidation() callback returns empty object on every call. ValidationStore debounces, sets isValidating=true, stores {}, sets isValidating=false. StatusBar displays zero issues. QC Dashboard shows empty state. ArchiveGrid/ArchiveList receive empty validation maps. Architecturally complete but functionally disconnected.
resolution: Wire validateTree(state) into scheduleValidation callback. Requires unifying ValidationIssue types first (see migration domain).

name: Inconsistent null root guards across views
description: 4 of 7 views have {#if root} guards before rendering. The other 3 pass root directly to children and rely on downstream null checks. Inconsistent guarding means some views throw or render broken state when root is briefly null during vault mutations or initial load.

Focus trap nested modal bug. ModalDialog stores previousFocus at init time. When 2+ modals are open (e.g. ExportDialog + PersonaSettings), inner modal cleanup restores focus to outer modal's backdrop, breaking focus trap chain. Each modal restores to document.activeElement at its init, not to previous modal.
resolution: Implement focus trap stack: each modal pushes/pops from shared stack. Cleanup restores to stack's previous entry, not document.activeElement snapshot.

description: Dialog z-index collision. Command Palette and Keyboard Shortcuts both use z-[3000]. PersonaSettings (700) can render behind QCDashboard (600) depending on open order. No centralized z-index token system. OnboardingModal z-[200] can be behind Sidebar backdrop z-[199].
resolution: Create z-index layer tokens in theme system. Assign: backdrop=100, panel=200, modal=300, overlay=400, command-palette=500, toast=600. Use tokens instead of arbitrary values.

description: Scroll lock refcount uses module-scope mutable state. ModalDialog tracks scrollLockCount in script module block. If modal unmounts abruptly (error boundary, exception in modal content), cleanup does not run. scrollLockCount becomes incorrect — subsequent modals cannot unlock body scroll.
resolution: Use try/finally pattern or MutationObserver to detect modal removal. Add scrollLockCount integrity check on modal mount.

name: Prop drilling 16 annotation props through ViewRouter
description: Inspector receives 16 props from ViewRouter, 10 annotation-related. ViewRouter unwraps AnnotationContext and passes as individual props instead of Inspector using getAnnotationContext() directly. Creates two sources of truth: context (in App) and props (from ViewRouter). Any new annotation field requires changes in 3 places.

name: Inconsistent media type detection mixing normalized and denormalized data
description: ViewRouter derives selectedMediaType from viewerData.canvas (denormalized, has nested items) but annotation handlers use selectedItem from vault.getEntity (normalized, stripped). If media type detection relies on denormalized structure but handlers use normalized form, type inference and annotation behavior may diverge.

content: No dialog mutual exclusion. DialogManagerStore has independent DialogState instances with no mechanism preventing multiple dialogs opening simultaneously. Multiple modals render with duplicate backdrop overlays and competing z-indices. closeAll() exists but is not called on open.

description: Content State timer closure bug. ViewRouter effect reassigns contentStateTimer inside effect body, but cleanup closure captures the variable reference. If selectedId changes twice rapidly, first timeout cleared but second cleanup runs with stale closure referencing different timer than the one scheduled.
resolution: Use a ref object ({ current: timer }) or move timer management outside effect into stable module scope.

name: 10 overlapping  blocks in App.svelte
description: 9 numbered effects (lines 344-434) plus 1 unnumbered root export effect (line 213). vault.state triggers both root export and validation. mode triggers both URL hash sync and mobile sidebar close. autoSave.dirty and settings have their own effects. 2 are setup-only (storage poll 30s, activity poll 10s).

name: lastActionType declared but never written
description: App.svelte:191 declares let lastActionType = $state<string | null>(null) and passes it to StatusBar as lastActionLabel (line 976). No code ever assigns to it — StatusBar label is always empty. Dead wire.

name: Keyboard shortcuts cover only 4 of 7 views
description: Cmd+1=Archive, Cmd+2=Collections, Cmd+3=Metadata, Cmd+4=Search. Viewer, Boards, Map, Timeline have no keyboard shortcut — accessible only via command palette or sidebar nav click. Discoverability gap for 3 core views.
